intended_use: DiaCardio's LVivo Software Application is intended for non-invasive processing of already acquired echocardiographic images in order to detect, measure, and calculate the left ventricular wall for lef
intended_use_full: DiaCardio's LVivo Software Application is intended for non-invasive processing of already acquired echocardiographic images in order to detect, measure, and calculate the left ventricular wall for left ventricular function evaluation. This measurement can be used to assist the clinician in a cardiac evaluation.
target_condition: Left ventricular dysfunction; assessment of left ventricular function
ground_truth: For strain evaluation: semi-automated Velocity Vector Imaging (VVI, Siemens); For wall motion evaluation: visual estimation by physicians; For ejection fraction: Manual Biplane Method (MBP)
other_metrics: Global Longitudinal Strain (GLS) correlation with VVI: r=0.85, p<0.0001; GLS intraclass correlation (ICC)=0.92; GLS kappa=0.77; Wall Motion score index ICC=0.86; Wall Motion score index kappa values by territory: LAD kappa=0.65 (ICC=0.8), RCA kappa not specified (ICC=0.82), CX kappa=0.51 (ICC=0.83); Biplane EF correlation (MBP vs LVivoEF): r=0.88, p<0.0001; GLS LVivoSG vs GLS LVivoEF: r=0.92
